turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Uh, hey, yeah,

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Hi,

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: part of pretty good AI.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Am I speaking with Paul?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Uh, sorry, I’m not Paul. I’m actually a patient calling in about something. Could you help me with that?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Of course.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Are you calling on behalf of Paul?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: or are you a different patient with your own chart here?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: No, no, I’m calling for myself. It's Dana Whitfield.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please provide your date of birth.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, it's March 22nd, 1979.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks Dana

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: What could I help you with today?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, no problem.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: So, I had a fall in the shower, 'cause, well, my belly's kind of in the way these days, and now I’ve got this really sharp pain in my pelvic area. I need to get it checked out.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: That sounds uncomfortable.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Just to confirm, you'd like to book an urgent visit to have your pelvic pain checked after your fall.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, exactly. I want to get in as soon as possible.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Do you have a preferred provider or would you like to see the first available?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: First available would be great, yeah.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: There aren't any open appointments this week.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like me to look for the next available slot after next Monday?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: or do you have a specific date in mind?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Honestly, if there's anything sooner, that'd be better, but yeah, after next Monday if that's all we got, let's check it out.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I checked for openings through the week after next.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: but there are still no available slots.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like me to have someone from the clinic call you back as soon as an appointment opens up?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, that sounds good. Could you also note that I'm pregnant, just so they're aware?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: They'll call you back as soon as they have an opening.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I've let the clinic support team know about your situation.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: If your pain gets worse or you have trouble walking, please seek care right away.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is there anything else I can help with?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: No, that's all. Thanks a lot. I'll wait for that call.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: You're all set, Dana.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: The clinic will reach out as soon as possible.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Take care.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Alright, thanks, you too. Bye.
